description_long: This house features a U-shaped layout with a central open courtyard, surrounded by two wings and a main block. The exterior is finished in a muted beige or light brown material, with a flat, dark gray roof that covers the entire structure. Large, rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged along the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The central courtyard is accessible through a wide, open entryway, which is flanked by glass doors and windows. Minimalist landscaping, including a few palm trees, adds a touch of greenery to the otherwise modern and streamlined design. The overall appearance is clean, functional, and contemporary, suitable for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: A modern, U-shaped house with a flat roof, beige exterior, and a central open courtyard, featuring large symmetrical windows and minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main facade with symmetrical windows and the central open courtyard entryway.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the wings and the flat roof, with visible windows along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the open courtyard area and additional windows, emphasizing the U-shaped layout.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side windows and the extension of the flat roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Wide, open central entryway with glass doors, no porch, and minimal decorative elements.
